mapper.select: select date(create_time) as date, count(0) as count from tb_lend where is_delete = 0 and date(create_time) >= date_sub(now(), interval 7 day) group by date(create_time)
select book.book_name, count(0) as lend_count from tb_lend lend join tb_book book on lend.book_id = book.id where lend.is_delete = 0 group by lend.book_id order by lend_count desc limit 5
